TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Eric_Anderson, title = Eric_Anderson, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Eric_Anderson} }

S.FORM: Eric Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 5, Eric Anderson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Eric Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 5, Eric Anderson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: eriʦ~ʨ an*ers~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, eriʦ~ʨ an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
